issue.details: Support Issue: The image "libmsalruntime.so" was built with the GCC_Linux_X86_64_11_4_0 compiler, which is a later version than the supported GCC_Linux_X86_64_4_9_4 compiler. Proceeding with this compiler version will degrade the performance of the analysis and the quality of the results. Use a supported compiler version to build the image.
